description: Shared Renovate preset for robotmindio repos. Extended by external repos (flights, realestate). NOTE: the robotmind monorepo no longer uses this preset — it has its own root renovate.json (separate scopes by design). Keep this in sync with the monorepo's hardened rules when they change.

packageRules.description: Group all non-major updates into a single PR per repo
Major updates get individual PRs for careful review
Pin GitHub Actions to SHA for supply chain security
Group all GitHub Actions updates together
Pin Docker digests for reproducible builds

Ignore our own ghcr.io/robotmindio/* images — they are built by each repo's CI and rolled by argocd-image-updater, not Renovate. Renovate cannot auth to the private registry anyway ('Error obtaining docker token' / no-result lookups), so this silences that noise and prevents Renovate from ever fighting image-updater on our own tags.

Group all @opentelemetry/* packages — partial bumps cascade peer-dep conflicts. sdk-node 0.218 pins sdk-metrics/resources 2.x; mixing with 1.30.x installs both side-by-side and tsc fails on Resource type drift.

Group all Python opentelemetry-* packages — same lockstep rationale as the JS cohort. instrumentation-* packages depend on a matching minor of the base opentelemetry-instrumentation; floating bumps let pip drift the base above what the instrumentation cohort expects.
Do not touch Node.js major version — managed manually
Do not touch Python major version — managed manually
Stability window — wait 3 days before proposing updates
Wider stability window for major updates

schedule: before 9am on the first day of the month
